untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a multi-leg options reversal strategy (short stock + short put + long call) with position management tied to option expiration and strike assignment logic. The backtest engine appears to be equity price-based and lacks: (1) options contract indicators for premium/credit tracking, (2) position-level synthetic spread tracking, (3) assignment/exercise mechanics, (4) expiration-aware exit logic. The 'total credit > striking price' entry condition and dual assignment paths at expiration cannot be expressed using only price and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires options trading infrastructure including: credit calculations from multiple legs, strike price assignment logic, and expiration mechanics. Recommend implementing as a custom strategy module rather than a rule-based condition set.
